description:
A patient on Cabozantinib is going on holiday and needs to check their travel medication kit. Using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app, determine the interaction traffic-light colors (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, or Grey) for Cyclizine, Loperamide, and Codeine when taken with Cabozantinib. Create a report file at /sdcard/travel_safety_report.txt using the following format:

Drug: Cabozantinib
Cyclizine: [Color]
Loperamide: [Color]
Codeine: [Color]
